title: Supply Chain Predictive Maintenance
summary: Predictive-maintenance workflow for remaining-useful-life forecasting on NASA C-MAPSS turbofan data.
outcome: Release-pending portfolio project; public presentation waits for reproducible evaluation and a verified deployment.
metrics: Remaining-useful-life evaluation evidence pending before public release
evaluation: Unit-level holdout validation, error by operating regime, and baseline comparison required before release
operationalTradeoffs: Predictive lead time must be balanced against false maintenance actions and incomplete telemetry
disclaimer: Educational project using public benchmark data. It is not a production maintenance recommendation system.
